news.headline: TOPPAN Holdings (TYO: 7911) acquires HID's CID business area, a division of HID Global Corp focused on govt.
news.summary: In Singapore on October 18, 2024, TOPPAN Holdings Inc. (TYO: 7911) revealed its plan to acquire HID's Citizen Identity Solutions (CID) business segment. This acquisition involves the division of HID Global Corporation that specializes in government-focused solutions. TOPPAN Holdings aims to enhance its portfolio by finalizing a definitive agreement for this procurement.

news.headline: FPT Software recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for Asia/Pacific MSS & PSS 2024 with 22 evaluated vendors.
news.summary: FPT Software, based in Hanoi, Vietnam, has recently been recognized as a Major Player in two IDC MarketScape reports. The first report, titled Asia/Pacific Managed Security Services (MSS) 2024 Vendor Assessment (Doc # AP51571224, September 2024), assessed 22 vendors in the region's competitive market. FPT Software was acknowledged for its performance in providing managed security services. The second report, Asia/Pacific Professional Security Services (PSS) 2024 Vendor Assessment (Doc # AP51571324, September 2024), also highlighted FPT Software's expertise in the field. These assessments are crucial in evaluating companies' standings and capabilities in the rapidly evolving cybersecurity landscape.

news.headline: Azerion moves up Q3 2024 results publication to 19 Nov 2024 from 28 Nov 2024, showcasing improved efficiencies.
news.summary: Amsterdam, 18 October 2024 - Azerion, a major digital advertising and entertainment media platform in Europe, has shifted its Q3 interim unaudited financial reporting date to 19 November 2024, moving it up by ten days from the original schedule of 28 November 2024. This adjustment comes after significant integration and consolidation efforts over the past year have contributed to Azerion's development as a publicly listed enterprise, leading to enhanced reporting efficiencies. These improvements demonstrate Azerion's dedication to prompt reporting, aiding its growth strategy and enabling quicker decision-making to capitalize on opportunities, thus facilitating the expansion of its market presence.

news.headline: Revenue increased by 2.4% in Q3 2024. Sports division saw strong growth, while flooring activity was slow in EMEA and CIS.
First collaboration event between TOKYO SKYTREE and "Jujutsu Kaisen" anime, started on Sept 25, to run for a certain period.
news.summary: The TOBU TOWER SKYTREE Co., Ltd., which operates TOKYO SKYTREE, has launched a collaborative event named "Jujutsu Kaisen in TOKYO SKYTREE" with the popular TV anime "Jujutsu Kaisen." Starting on September 25th, this event marks the first partnership between the tower and the anime series. The event is set to continue for a significant period, offering visitors a unique experience at the iconic tower.

news.headline: EDF successfully raises ¥35.8 billion through "Samourai" senior multi-tranche bond issue.
news.summary: EDF has reported the successful completion of its senior multi-tranche bond offering named "Samourai." The issuance amounted to a total of ¥35.8 billion in nominal value.

news.headline: Equinor ASA repurchases shares under third tranche of 2024 buy-back program for tickers OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR, CEUX:EQNRO, TQEX:EQNRO.
news.summary: Details have been released regarding the transactions conducted as part of Equinor ASA's 2024 share buy-back program. This third tranche involved significant activity for the company under the tickers OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR, CEUX:EQNRO, TQEX:EQNRO. Key numbers pertaining to these transactions include the total shares bought back, the average price per share, and the overall value of the buy-back.

news.headline: Awilco Drilling PLC issued 10,136,819 new SNDRs at NOK 1 per share through a Private Placement.
news.summary: Awilco Drilling PLC, recently announced the issuance of 10,136,819 new Sponsored Norwegian Depository Receipts (SNDRs), as detailed in stock exchange notices on October 1 and 10. This issuance stems from the exercise of 10,136,819 warrants at a rate of NOK 1 per SNDR, constituting the "Private Placement." The corresponding issuance also includes new shares.

Uniswap (UNI) now integrates World Chain for improved DeFi options, enabling swaps and liquidity on Layer 2 for cost-effective and quick experiences.
news.summary: Uniswap (UNI) has recently integrated World Chain into its platform, enabling users to easily swap and provide liquidity on its Layer 2 blockchain. This update promises to offer a faster and more cost-effective on-chain experience for users.

news.headline: New AI model SLIViT transforms 3D medical image analysis. Developed by UCLA, it outperforms traditional methods, offering cost-effective solutions.
news.summary: Researchers at UCLA have introduced SLIViT, an artificial intelligence model designed to rapidly analyze 3D medical images. This innovative technology has proven to be more effective than traditional methods, providing cost-effective solutions for medical imaging. The AI model has shown remarkable performance, marking a significant advancement in the field.

news.headline: Gala Music launches Halloween Mystery Boxes with $MUSIC rewards & NFTs. Each $19.99 purchase burns $GALA tokens.
news.summary: Gala Music has launched Halloween "Trick or Treat" Mystery Boxes that provide the chance to win $MUSIC rewards or exclusive NFTs. These boxes are priced at $19.99 each, and with every purchase, tokens are burned to support $GALA. This initiative aims to engage users in the spirit of Halloween while also offering the opportunity to earn valuable rewards through the purchase of these Mystery Boxes.

news.headline: Volvo Group Q3 2024: Net sales down 7% to SEK 117.0 billion, vehicle sales decrease by 11%, services sales up by 4%. Operating income at SEK 14.1 billion, margin at 12.0%.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, the Volvo Group experienced a normalization in demand across its markets, with net sales decreasing by 7% to SEK 117.0 billion compared to the previous year. Vehicle sales were down by 11%, while service sales increased by 4%. The adjusted operating income for the quarter was SEK 14.1 billion, with a margin of 12.0%. The company attributed this performance to the efforts of its employees and partners. Net sales, when adjusted for currency, decreased by 7%, and there were no adjustments made in the quarter. Overall, the company reported a decrease in net sales and operating income compared to the same period in 2023.

news.headline: Ethereum's Pectra fork adjusts blob fees for L2 scaling, following Dencun upgrade's intro of blobs in March, 7 months prior.
news.summary: A suggestion to modify the blob gas target and maximum values on Ethereum has emerged approximately seven months following the introduction of blobs in the blockchain's Dencun upgrade that occurred in March.

news.headline: Record gold prices surge due to tensions in the Middle East.
Ivar Kurvits appointed to Inbank Management Board on October 17, 2024 after returning from sabbatical.
news.summary: Ivar Kurvits has been appointed as a new member of the Management Board of AS Inbank by the Supervisory Board. Kurvits, who returned from a sabbatical, officially began his role on October 17, 2024.

Dogecoin spikes post Musk's mention in Pennsylvania Town Hall; potential "Department of Government Efficiency" sparks chatter.
news.summary: Elon Musk was jokingly asked if he would lead a new "Department of Government Efficiency," to which he playfully replied with a grin, "Yeah, Doge."

news.headline: Altman's Worldcoin rebrands to "World" & launches Ethereum-based Layer-2 network 'World Chain.' Orb 2.0 for iris data exchange.
news.summary: Sam Altman's project, formerly known as Worldcoin (CRYPTO: WLD), has been rebranded as "World." In addition to the rebrand, the team introduced World Chain, an Ethereum-based Layer-2 network during an event with Altman and project executives. They revealed plans for Orb 2.0, an upgraded version of the biometric imaging device used to collect iris data in exchange for WLD tokens. The introduction of World Chain signifies a significant development within the project.

news.headline: Healthcare orders in China are bouncing back for GE, according to Bloomberg.
Crypto expert Hayes predicts Bitcoin will rise with oil, energy surge if Iran-Israel tensions escalate.
news.summary: Arthur Hayes, one of the co-founders of BitMEX, foresees a potential increase in the price of Bitcoin should tensions between Iran and Israel escalate. Hayes predicts that Bitcoin's value will also be positively impacted by the surging oil and energy prices. This forecast suggests that Bitcoin might experience an upward trend parallel to the geopolitical situation, potentially influencing global financial markets. Hayes' perspective highlights the interconnected nature of various markets and the potential implications of geopolitical events on digital currencies.

news.headline: Toyoda Gosei (TOKYO:7282) doubles rubber recycling capacity in Japan to promote auto rubber recycling, tackling rare waste issue.
news.summary: Toyoda Gosei Co., Ltd, based in Kiyosu, Japan, has announced plans to double its rubber recycling capacity at the Morimachi Plant in central Japan, as part of efforts to boost the recycling of rubber used in automobiles. The company, listed as TOKYO:7282, aims to address the challenge of recycling rubber products, which are mostly incinerated due to the difficulty in recycling. With progress seen in recycling steel and plastic in the auto industry, Toyoda Gosei's move marks a significant step in enhancing sustainability practices. The company initiated its first recycling line in FY20, underscoring its commitment to promoting circular economy principles.

news.headline: Nokia reveals alterations to its Group Leadership Team.
EfTEN Härgmäe OÜ acquired ELP Logistics OÜ center on 17.10.2024 in Tallinn. Property leased for 10+5 years.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, EfTEN Härgmäe OÜ completed the acquisition of properties at Härgmäe Str. 8 and Piimamehe Str. 7 in Tallinn from Conus Assets OÜ. This transaction follows the earlier notification to the stock exchange on September 20, 2024, regarding the contract of sale under the law of obligations. All conditions for ownership transfer and real right contract conclusion have been satisfied. The properties are set to be utilized by logistics company ELP Logistics OÜ under a long-term lease agreement spanning at least 10 years with a renewal option for an additional 5 years.

news.headline: Coop Pank Q3 2024: 202,000 total customers (+6,000/qtr), 90,100 active customers (+600/qtr).
news.summary: At the conclusion of the third quarter of 2024, Coop Pank experienced considerable growth in its customer base. The bank's total customer count stood at 202,000, showing an increase of 6,000 customers throughout the quarter, marking a 3% growth. Over the course of the year, the bank saw a significant rise of 27,000 customers, indicating a 15% increase in its customer base. Additionally, Coop Pank reported having 90,100 active customers, which saw a quarterly growth of 600 customers, representing a 1% increase. In the span of a year, the bank observed a notable surge of 12,700 active customers, reflecting a 16% increase.

Former official praises ECB for focusing on bank risks 10 years after financial crisis.
Trump proposes up to 20% tariffs with 60% on China imports. Paul Krugman warns it could set back economy 90 years.
news.summary: In a recent interview, former President Donald Trump has proposed a substantial increase in import tariffs, suggesting rates as high as 20%, with a specific 60% tariff on imports from China. This move has been criticized by Nobel-winning economist Paul Krugman in a recent opinion piece. Economists have also expressed concerns about the potential negative impact of such high tariffs on the economy, as highlighted by Krugman through his column in The New York Times. Krugman further emphasized the detrimental effects of Trump's tariff ideas, labeling them as even worse than initially thought. Trump has argued that these elevated tariffs would help reduce U.S. trade deficits and boost domestic manufacturing.Kruman shared his column through a tweet asking if Trump's tariff ideas are really that bad, stating that they are, in fact, worse.

news.headline: Harris to Speak at Campaign Event in Oakland County, Michigan 8:10 PM ET
Harris to speak at campaign event in Lansing, Michigan at 5:25pm ET
Harris to Speak at Campaign Event in Grand Rapids, Michigan at 2:35pm ET
New eye-tracking device by Lenovo aids ALS patients with advanced AI, enhancing communication (Read more).
news.summary: Lenovo introduces a cutting-edge eye-tracking device designed to improve accessibility for individuals with ALS. This innovative device incorporates state-of-the-art AI technology to enhance communication for patients. The device aims to revolutionize the way ALS patients communicate by enabling them to control devices through eye movements. This groundbreaking technology has the potential to significantly benefit the estimated 20,000-30,000 individuals in the United States living with ALS.

news.headline: New initiative from GitHub provides discounts & resources to nonprofits for tech capabilities & social impact. #supportingnonprofits
news.summary: A recently launched GitHub platform provides special offers and tools to aid nonprofits in boosting their technological abilities and fostering social change. The portal aims to assist these organizations in maximizing their impact by offering exclusive discounts and resources.

news.headline: Singapore introduces International Committee Bill to enhance dispute resolution hub status, presented on Oct 14, 2024.
news.summary: On October 14, 2024, the Singapore International Commercial Court (International Committee) Bill was presented for First Reading in Singapore's Parliament. This legislation aims to create an International Committee for the Singapore International Court. This development marks a significant step in enhancing Singapore's legal framework for international commercial disputes.

news.headline: Global Energy Forum in Dongying, China attracted 100+ top oil and gas companies for new product launch on Oct 16-17, 2024.
news.summary: In Dongying, China, on October 16-17, the Smart Manufacturing • Greener Future 2024 Global Energy Forum & New Product Launch took place, drawing over 100 leading oil and gas firms, oil service providers, and engineering companies.

news.headline: China's foreign entry and exit trips increased by 50.5% year on year in 3Q.
